description: Trigger an Acceldata rule execution and surface results as a Dagster asset check.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key to attach this check to

api_token_env_var.label: Api Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Acceldata API token

rule_id.label: Rule Id
rule_id.description: ID of the Acceldata DQ rule to execute. Find in Acceldata UI: Rules → Rule Details → ID.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout Seconds
timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for rule execution

name: Acceldata Check
